since_last: 50% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +0.81%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 50% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.19% · BTC +0.80% · Gold -0.05% · Nasdaq100 +0.04%. 50% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +0.81%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +0.81%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.80%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +5.43%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +5.43%, BABA +4.83%, SMR +3.50%, TER +3.37%, MDB +3.27%. Laggards: ORCL -3.87%, KLAC -3.15%, SPCX -3.14%, PANW -3.09%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.14% at $120.1
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.14% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
